title: Stir-Fried Korean Apples
description: A fusion of Chinese and Korean flavors with the addition of crispy apples, perfect for a quick and easy dessert.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced apples and cook until they start to caramelize, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the muchim to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, ginger, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the sauce over the apples and muchim, and stir-fry until everything is well coated.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with sesame oil and a sprinkle of sesame seeds if desired.
